description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier — discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Cross-platform (POSIX and Windows) process-environment conformance harness for launch semantics (inheritance, replacement, append/omit, malformed/env block edge cases), suitable as a shared acceptance test for all organvm runners/VMs.
ranked.first_task: Publish this harness as a shared, versioned conformance test package and run it in every runner/VM CI matrix before release.
